decision_scope: Source-specific catalog lineage and object evidence; proximity alone is never identity evidence. S547 and VUCD3 remain distinct.
delegated_authorization_scope: Continue source auditing autonomously until scientific input is absolutely required

source_evidence.separate_object_rationale: Fahrion table B1 preserves S547 and VUCD3 as separate M87 objects with a 0.412226650676-arcsecond separation, different literature references, different magnitudes, and different effective sizes. Gaia and the DR10 viewer image do not resolve the close pair reliably, so their shared Gaia source is ambiguous evidence rather than an identity equivalence.

Fahrion table B1 preserves S547 and VUCD3 as separate M87 objects with a 0.412226650676-arcsecond separation, different literature references, different magnitudes, and different effective sizes. Gaia and the DR10 viewer image do not resolve the close pair reliably, so their shared Gaia source is ambiguous evidence rather than an identity equivalence.
